name: Mailbox
shortDescription: Comprehensive email management solution for reading, sending, and managing emails through SMTP and IMAP protocols.

actions.name: Read Inbox
actions.description: Reads the inbox and retrieves the last N emails, parsing them into a structured format. Supports various filter criteria including sender, recipient, subject, date ranges, and read status.

actions.name: Mark Email As Unread
actions.description: Marks a specified email as unread in the mailbox. This allows you to reset the read status of an email that was previously marked as read.

actions.name: Send Email
actions.description: Sends an email using SMTP configuration. Supports both plain text and HTML content, along with CC, BCC, priority settings and custom reply-to addresses.

idealUseCases: Automated email monitoring and processing workflows
Customer support ticket management and auto-responses
Marketing email campaign management and tracking
Email-based data collection and lead generation
